mapper.select: select id, entrustment_no, entrust_type, entrust_people, entrust_phone, witness_uint, witness_person, witness_phone, project_name, project_part, sampling_method, check_purpose, report_count, report_type, request_date, payment_method, present_information, acceptance_date, team, state, remark, invalid_reason, operate_user, operate_date, file_url, is_save from test_entrusted where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT t1.entrustment_no as entrustmentNo, t3.sample_name as sampleNname, t1.entrust_people as entrustPeople, t1.project_name as projectName FROM test_entrusted AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t3 ON t2.sample_id = t3.id
and t1.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t3.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleNname},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT into test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel(sample_id, check_item_id, standard_file_id, test_method_id, times, unit_price ) VALUES
(#{item.sampleId},#{item.checkItemId},#{item.standardFileId},#{item.testMethodId},#{times},#{item.unitPrice})
insert into test_entrusted_payment_record(entrustment_id, price, payment_date, operator ) values (#{entrustmentId},#{price},#{paymentDate},#{operator})
